headline: Goldman Sachs Assumes SBA Communications at Neutral, Announces Price Target of $205
summary: Goldman Sachs  analyst Michael Ng   assumes SBA Communications (NASDAQ:SBAC) with a Neutral rating and announces Price Target of $205.
